title: Old Mojang Loading Screen 1.16+
description: Restores the pre 1.16 mojang logo on the loading screens.
body:
# THIS PACK NEEDS PUZZLE OR OPTIFINE TO WORK PROPERLY!! # the pack is broken on a few versions from 1.21.1 onto like 1.21.6? Brings back the old mojang logo on the title and resource pack reloading screens.
I don't update the tags for new versions very often but unless puzzle makes some weird change which breaks compatibility it should work. Made for 1.16 and newer. ![Loading screen with the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b22bbc60f5e0ced3fedf9553e9e3f02a98ff388.png)
